summary: ThreeDScene quaternion slerp: interpolate q_0=(1, 0, 0, 0) to q_1=rotation(y, π/2) using sin((1-t)Ω)/sin Ω + sin(tΩ)/sin Ω formula. ValueTracker t_tr sweeps 0→1 with always_redraw: RED/GREEN/BLUE rotated frame axes + YELLOW e_3-image dot tracing great-circle arc on BLUE unit sphere + growing YELLOW trail. Ambient rotation.
